title: Serapure Bead production
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"9qiqi","text":"Just make sure all the components have been purchased. It is not a difficult protocol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: In a 50 mL conical using sterile stock solutions, prepare TE (10 mM Tris-­‐HCl and 1 mM EDTA); - 500 μL 1 M Tris pH8 - 100 μL 0.5 M EDTA Fill conical to 50 mL mark with dH20.

To a to a new 50 mL, sterile conical add; - 9 g PEG-­‐8000 - 10 mL 5 M NaCL (or 2.92 g) - 500 μL1 M Tris-­‐HCL - 100 μL0.5 M EDTA - 0.250 ul 10% tween-20 - Fill to ~ 49 mL using sterile dH20. Mix conical for about 3-­‐5 minutes until PEG goes into solution (solution, upon sitting, should be clear). -Fill to ~ 49 mL using sterile dH20. gently.
Mix Sera-­‐mag SpeedBeads and transfer 1 mL to a 1.5 mL microtube. Sera-Mag Speed Beads GE Healthcare Catalog #65152105050250
Place SpeedBeads on magnet stand until beads are drawn to magnet. Discard supernatant
Add 1 mL TE to beads, remove from magnet, mix, return to magnet. Discard supernatant
Add 1 mL TE to beads, remove from magnet, mix, return to magnet. Discard supernatant
Add 1 mL TE to beads and remove from magnet. Fully resuspend and set microtube in rack (i.e. not on magnet stand).
Mix 1 mL SpeedBead + TE solution and transfer to 50 mL conical.
Fill conical to 50 mL mark with dH20 (if not already there) and gently mix 50 mL conical until brown.
Wrap in tinfoil (or place in dark container) and store at 4°C.
Test against AMPure XP using aliquots of ladder (Fermentas GeneRuler).I recommend the 50 bp ladder in place of the ultra-­‐low rangeladder.
Mix 2 μLGeneRuler with 18 μL dH20.
Incubate mixture 5 min.at room temperature.
Add 20 μLGeneRuler mixture to a volume of Serapure and/or AMPure(the specific volume depends on whether you are trying exclude small fragments or not; see the figure on the next page).
Place on magnet stand. Discard supernatant.
Add 500 μL70 % EtOH.
Incubate on stand for 1 min. Discard supernatant.
Add 500 μL 70% EtOH.
Incubate on stand for 1 min. Remove supernatant.
Place beads on 37°C heat block for 3-­‐4 min.until dry.
Re-hydrate with 20 μLdH20 for 5 minutes.
Place on magnet stand. Transfer supernatant to new tube.
Mix supernatant with 3 μLloading dye. Use the same ladder Electrophorese in 1.5 % agarose for 60 minutes at 100 V (or as you please)

Use 20ul of the ladder/water mix and add to these amounts of the serapure beads and the ampure beads. 0.9X sample - 18 ul 1.2X sample- 24 ul 1.5X sample - 30 ul 1.8X sample- 36 ul 2.1X sample - 42 ul 2.5X sample - 50 ul 2.7X sample - 54 ul
creator: Eric RA Pederson
